JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL id gl_ref_tdx_flowlines ID_text END_X;END_Y;START_X;START_Y "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL hl_link gl_ngen_tdx_hydrolocations hl_link poi_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL poi_id gl_ngen_tdx_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL poi_id gl_ngen_tdx_flowlines poi_id order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL flowpath_id gl_ngen_tdx_flowlines id order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LC_InflowsOutflows_GL flowpath_id gl_ngen_tdx_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #
